final:
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    output reg X
);always @(*) begin
        if ((A1 & A2) || (B1 & C1))
            X = 1;
        else
            X = 0;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X = ~((A1 & A2) | (B1 & C1));
    end
  end

endmodule
